pokemon:vespiquen.name: Vespiquen
pokemon:vespiquen.summary: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by Combee.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by Combee.
It releases various pheromones to make the grubs in its body do its bidding while fighting foes.
It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.
Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by COMBEE.
It raises grubs in the holes in its body. It secretes pheromones to control COMBEE.
Commands its subjects to build its hive. It will dispatch any interlopers who dare sneak into its nest and use them as nourishment for itself.
It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.
When endangered, grubs from its six-cell honeycomb strike back. There is only one in a colony.
It releases various pheromones to make the grubs in its body do its bidding while fighting foes.
Vespiquen that give off more pheromones have larger swarms of Combee attendants.
It raises grubs in the holes in its body. It secretes pheromones to control COMBEE.
It skillfully commands its grubs in battles with its enemies. The grubs are willing to risk their lives to defend Vespiquen.
It releases various pheromones to make the grubs in its body do its bidding while fighting foes.
It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.
It houses its colony in cells in its body and releases various pheromones to make those grubs do its bidding.
Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by Combee.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by Combee.

pokemon:combee.name: Combee
pokemon:combee.summary: It collects and delivers honey to its colony. At night, they cluster to form a beehive and sleep.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It collects and delivers honey to its colony. At night, they cluster to form a beehive and sleep.
The trio is together from birth. It constantly gathers honey from flowers to please Vespiquen.
This Pokémon is a set of three. When they sleep, they gather up and form a giant hive of 100 Combee.
A Pokémon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to VESPIQUEN.
At night, COMBEE sleep in a group of about a thousand, packed closely together in a lump.
They swear fealty to a queen Pokémon and work diligently to gather nectar. Each swarm produces a different flavor of honey.
The trio is together from birth. It constantly gathers honey from flowers to please Vespiquen.
It collects and delivers honey to its colony. At night, they cluster to form a beehive and sleep.
The trio is together from birth. It constantly gathers honey from flowers to please VESPIQUEN.
It ceaselessly gathers nectar from sunrise to sundown, all for the sake of Vespiquen and the swarm.
At night, COMBEE sleep in a group of about a thousand, packed closely together in a lump.
The members of the trio spend all their time together. Each one has a slightly different taste in nectar.
The trio is together from birth. It constantly gathers honey from flowers to please Vespiquen.
This Pokémon is a set of three. When they sleep, they gather up and form a giant hive of 100 Combee.
The trio is together from birth. It constantly gathers honey from flowers to please Vespiquen.
It collects and delivers honey to its colony. At night, they cluster to form a beehive and sleep.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It collects and delivers honey to its colony. At night, they cluster to form a beehive and sleep.
